title: Add Wave 24 manager dashboard summary and priorities regression matrix
description: Expand QA regression coverage for manager dashboard summary contract and priorities feed while preserving Wave 20-23 auth, assignment-context, filters, and timeline baselines.
acceptance_criteria: Regression matrix includes summary KPI and priorities payload checks with ordering guarantees
API tests assert deterministic unauthorized/forbidden envelopes for summary route
Wave 20-23 manager baselines remain stable after Wave 24 coverage is added
